pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation confirms this as a standard format name (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation-for-android-2-0/1/en/topic/gps-coordinates)

pi_items.verified_value: N 40° 26' 46" (valid DMS format following pattern N degrees° minutes' seconds")
pi_items.source: DMS format validation against Sygic's documented format examples: N 48°08′35″ E 17°07′50″. The example provided follows correct DMS notation.

pi_items.metadata_value: Settings > Regional or Preferences (from task description)
pi_items.verified_value: Settings > View & Units (in Sygic GPS Navigation v20.x+) OR Settings > Regional/Regional Preferences (in v17.x-18.x)
pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation shows menu structure changed across versions. Current versions (v24.3) list complete settings sections at https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/settings, which shows 'View & Units' as the current location for coordinate format settings.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura) on Android. The 'GPS Coordinates' setting is the correct setting name and it supports 'Degrees, Minutes, Seconds' format as documented in Sygic's official manuals. The example format 'N 40° 26' 46"' is a valid DMS coordinate representation. However, the settings navigation path described in the task ('Regional or Preferences section') does not match current Sygic documentation. The GPS Coordinates setting is located in the 'View & Units' section in modern Sygic versions (20.x+), not in 'Regional' or 'Preferences' sections.
